evidence.claim: Loose hotel outlet caused overnight charging failure
Anker Nano Travel Adapter weighs about 107g and provides 20W USB-C
Anker Prime 67W uses a redesigned compact structure for wall stability
Short-cable wall head reduces static torque versus adapter stack under assumed parameters
Desktop charger architecture already keeps the main body off the wall

hypotheses.statement: Wall-end mechanical instability is a meaningful pain point
A short input cable can materially reduce wall-end load
Users need overnight charging interruption confirmation
A detachable battery reduces total carried weight
